name: Wrath

abilities.name: Jam Session
abilities.text: This model may be chosen as a leader in any faction. If it is, it gains the master characteristic and this crew must be comprised of exactly all seven Crossroads models and a soulstone pool of 6.

abilities.name: Mosh Pit
abilities.text: When an enemy model activates within 6", this model may drain a (soulstone). If it does, the enemy must drain a (soulstone), discard a card or declare the Charge action controlled by this model, ignoring engagement.

actions.name: Burst Eardrum
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3. The target gains a Craven token.

triggers.name: Siphon Life
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage and this model heals 1.

triggers.name: Encore
triggers.text: Once per activation. Declare this action again, targeting the same model.

actions.name: Rush the Stage
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target moves its Sp toward this model. Then, the target must declare a (melee) action targeting this model, if able. Then, this model declares a (melee) action against the target, if able.

actions.name: Antagonize the Crowd
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. This model heals 2 for each non-peon enemy within range.

triggers.name: Crowd Surfing
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with an enemy within range. Draw a card.

extraction_notes: Card shows 'On Tour' text in bottom left corner
